user_prompt:
User Requirement: do a counterflow flame simulation using OpenFOAM reactingFoam solver, employing a compressible flow solver for detailed combustion modeling. Define the computational domain as a 2D rectangular region with a width of 0.02 meters and a height of 0.02 meters. Use CH4, O2 and N2 as species. Include chemical kinetics using the reaction mechanism. velocity of fuel is 0.2 m/s and velocity of air is -0.1 m/s. Set the simulation runtime from 0 to 0.5 seconds with a write interval of 0.05 seconds and deltaT of 1e-6.

Reference Directory Structure (similar case): <dir>directory name: 0. File names in this directory: [CH4, CO2, H2O, N2, O2, T, U, Ydefault, alphat, p]</dir>
<dir>directory name: system. File names in this directory: [blockMeshDict, controlDict, fvSchemes, fvSolution]</dir>
<dir>directory name: constant. File names in this directory: [chemistryProperties, combustionProperties, momentumTransport, physicalProperties, reactions, thermo.compressibleGas]</dir>

There are 10 files in Directory: 0,
There are 4 files in Directory: system,
There are 6 files in Directory: constant

Make sure you generate all the necessary files for the user's requirements.Do not include any gmsh files like .geo etc. in the subtasks.Only include blockMesh or snappyHexMesh if the user hasnt requested for gmsh mesh or user isnt using an external uploaded custom meshPlease generate the output as structured JSON.
response: subtasks=[SubtaskModel(file_name='CH4', folder_name='0'), SubtaskModel(file_name='CO2', folder_name='0'), SubtaskModel(file_name='H2O', folder_name='0'), SubtaskModel(file_name='N2', folder_name='0'), SubtaskModel(file_name='O2', folder_name='0'), SubtaskModel(file_name='T', folder_name='0'), SubtaskModel(file_name='U', folder_name='0'), SubtaskModel(file_name='Ydefault', folder_name='0'), SubtaskModel(file_name='alphat', folder_name='0'), SubtaskModel(file_name='p', folder_name='0'), SubtaskModel(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system'), SubtaskModel(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system'), SubtaskModel(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system'), SubtaskModel(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system'), SubtaskModel(file_name='chemistryProperties', folder_name='constant'), SubtaskModel(file_name='combustionProperties', folder_name='constant'), SubtaskModel(file_name='momentumTransport', folder_name='constant'), SubtaskModel(file_name='physicalProperties', folder_name='constant'), SubtaskModel(file_name='reactions', folder_name='constant'), SubtaskModel(file_name='thermo.compressibleGas', folder_name='constant')]
